analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet notes multiple crises in East Africa (locusts, COVID-19, landslides, floods) and states that "We have mobilised €3 million to get emergency aid to those most in need," implying EU action abroad. Evaluation by narrative: EU1 (successful story) – not supported; no historical reflection or claims of long-term success. EU2 (united) – not indicated; no mention of intra-EU unity or solidarity among member states. EU3 (useful for its citizens) – not applicable, as the aid targets East Africa, not EU citizens. EU4 (avant-garde) – not relevant; no pioneering regulation or leadership claim. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – not clearly; while humanitarian aid is positive, the tweet doesn’t frame it as defending rights or fair causes. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – supported; it highlights EU emergency aid contributing to global well-being and assistance abroad. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU6.
